# terrakube_registry_provider (Data Source)

Looks up a provider published in the organization's Terrakube registry by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "terrakube_organization" "org" {
  name = "my-org"
}

data "terrakube_registry_provider" "random" {
  organization_id = data.terrakube_organization.org.id
  name            = "random"
}

output "random_provider_id" {
  value = data.terrakube_registry_provider.random.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Provider name
- `organization_id` (String) Terrakube organization ID

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Provider description
- `id` (String) Provider ID
- `imported` (Boolean) Whether the provider mirrors an upstream public provider
- `registry_namespace` (String) Upstream registry namespace for imported providers (e.g. `hashicorp`)
